name: umoyapool
description: UmoyaPool — private and programmable yield platform for AI agents on Stellar

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
